title: lastrea normalis
intro: Lastrea normalis, also known as the Normal Fern or the Indian Holly Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea normalis lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and its antibacterial properties, making it a valuable ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Lastrea normalis include its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Lastrea normalis typically involve drying and crushing the plant's fronds, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
